'''sanash''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:king|king]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-?-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:king|king]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || sæ?inith || sæ?inij || sæ?inish || sæ?ini
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || sa?u?unuth || sa?u?unuj || sa?u?unush || sa?u?unu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || sa?unuth || sa?unuj || sa?unush || sa?unu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || sa?ufnufth || sa?ufnufj || sa?ufnufsh || sa?ufnuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || sæ?eneth || sæ?enej || sæ?enesh || sæ?ene
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || sa?o?onoth || sa?o?onoj || sa?o?onosh || sa?o?ono
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || sa?onoth || sa?onoj || sa?onosh || sa?ono
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || sa?ofnofth || sa?ofnofj || sa?ofnofsh || sa?ofnof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || sa?ïfnïfth || sa?ïfnïfj || sa?ïfnïfsh || sa?ïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || sa?ïf?ïfnïfth || sa?ïf?ïfnïfj || sa?ïf?ïfnïfsh || sa?ïf?ïfnïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || sæ?ænæth || sæ?ænæj || sæ?ænæsh || sæ?ænæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || sa?a?anath || sa?a?anaj || sa?a?anash || sa?a?ana
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || sa?anath || sa?anaj || sa?anash || sa?ana
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || sa?afnafth || sa?afnafj || sa?afnafsh || sa?afnaf
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sa?anatha || sa?anaja || sa?anasha || sa?anaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || sa?anath || sa?anaj || sa?anash || sa?ana
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sa?anathal || sa?anajal || sa?anashal || sa?anakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sa?anaathatha || sa?anaajaja || sa?anaashasha || sa?anaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || sa?anathan || sa?anajan || sa?anashan || sa?anakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sa?anathaoro || sa?anajaoro || sa?anashaoro || sa?anakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
